complaint: The car won't charge from my home outlet at all anymore and I get a charging error, I'm scared the battery or charger is destroyed and the car is now useless.
observations: No AC charge accepted on Level 1; DC fast charge still works
Onboard charger module reports fault, 12V accessory battery weak
Charge port and EVSE test good on another vehicle
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'onboard charger module'.
